creator: jrtc27@freebsd.org
text:
I'm assuming these show up as GPEs, so this will be because for some reason arm64's acpica_machdep.h enables ACPI_REDUCED_HARDWARE, which is described as:

  ACPICA will not attempt to access any ACPI-relate hardware (SCI, GPEs, Fixed Events, etc.)

This is also presumably the cause of the following message during boot:

  acpi0: Could not update all GPEs: AE_NOT_CONFIGURED
